name: Santa Fe Chicken Avacado Melt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine mayonnaise, 1-1/2 tablespoons cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
2. Spread the mixture on top of the bread.
3. Place chicken breast halves on the bread.
4. Layer tomatoes, avocado, and Lorraine cheese over the chicken.
5. Broil the sandwich until the cheese melts.
6. Sprinkle with remaining cilantro.
